items.title: Trump claims he can ‘future proof’ crypto regulation with CLARITY Act
items.summary: The future of a digital asset market structure bill in Congress is still uncertain amid concerns over ethics provisions, with the president, whose crypto ties are under scrutiny, weighing in on social media.

items.title: OKX Ventures buys $53 million stake in Korea's Coinone exchange
items.summary: The crypto exchange's investment arm and Korea Investment & Securities will each invest 80 billion won ($53 million) as Coinone pushes into stablecoins and tokenized securities.

items.title: XRP rebounds above $1.30 after volume surge, but bears still control the bigger picture
items.summary: XRP snapped a streak of lower lows on heavy buying, though the token remains stuck below major resistance levels that have capped every rally this year.

items.title: Bitcoin, ether little-changed despite record stocks, falling oil and easing war fears
items.summary: Global stocks hit records and oil cracked on a tentative US-Iran ceasefire extension. Crypto stayed on the sidelines, with some analysts saying the next catalyst is regulatory, not geopolitical.

items.title: Bitcoin's record holder supply hides a buyer drought, CryptoQuant says
items.summary: A record high in long-term holder supply typically signals conviction. CryptoQuant says it reflects a shortage of new buyers, a view echoed by weakening ETF demand and bearish prediction market odds.

items.title: SEC approves Paxos as ‘blockchain-native’ clearing agency
items.summary: Paxos says its approval as a blockchain-focused clearing agency represents a “critical piece of financial market infrastructure” as Wall Street becomes more interested in crypto.

items.title: Bitcoin’s major holders halt buys as demand slows: CryptoQuant
items.summary: CryptoQuant says that the holding structure for large Bitcoin holders is deteriorating, a trend that has historically preceded “sustained price weakness.”

items.title: Sui Network back online after ‘crash bug’ causes 6-hour outage
items.summary: The Sui mainnet has resumed after a bug in a network update took it offline for 5 hours and 55 minutes.

items.title: Bitcoin’s trapped under $74K while $9B options expiry looms: Are bears back in control?
items.summary: Bears hold the upper hand for Friday's $9 billion options expiry, keeping Bitcoin under pressure amid heavy ETF outflows and corporate selling

items.title: Buy $72K dip, or jump ship: What will Bitcoin bulls do?
items.summary: Investors selling across spot, futures and ETF markets pushed Bitcoin into its monthly range lows near $72,000 but data shows retail investors buying the dip and opening longs.

items.title: Gemini taps Grok for personalized AI-powered prediction market feeds
items.summary: Gemini is leaning into AI features for its prediction market, following other crypto exchanges in moving beyond crypto trading amid a market slump.

items.title: Calamos bets protected Bitcoin ETFs can outlast crypto market swings
items.summary: As more than $1 billion exited spot Bitcoin ETFs last week, Calamos says investors are rotating into Bitcoin products with built-in downside protection.

items.title: Crypto trading firm FalconX confidentially files with SEC for IPO, hires bankers
items.summary: FalconX has hired Cantor and other bankers to advise on a potential IPO and confidentially filed draft paperwork with the SEC, though the listing is not expected until later this year amid volatile market conditions.

items.title: Why the Ethereum Foundation is suddenly again at the center of crypto’s culture war
items.summary: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we're diving deep into the institution that has been the main steward for the Ethereum blockchain, and why its been back in the spotlight.

items.title: Tether's U.S.-focused stablecoin grows over 500% in a month, but still lags main rivals
items.summary: USAT's market cap jumped above $140 million in April, though it remains well behind Circle's USDC, PayPal's PYUSD and Ripple's RLUSD tokens.

items.title: Bitwise bets Hyperliquid could power future finance as HYPE ETFs gain traction
items.summary: Bitwise says investor demand for Hyperliquid exposure is surging as new HYPE ETFs launch.

items.title: Hyperliquid's pre-IPO SpaceX contracts suffer 45% flash crash, liquidating $1.5 million
items.summary: A massive selloff in a SpaceX crypto token wiped out hundreds of retail traders in 30 minutes because the market lacked enough cash to absorb the shock.

items.title: UniCredit warns Europe may struggle to contain crypto-bank crisis under MiCA rules
items.summary: EU deposit insurance (up to €100,000) may not absorb stress from large stablecoin reserve accounts, unlike the full protection offered by U.S. regulators.

items.title: Toddlers learn by falling: Why DeFi's $20 billion TVL drop is just a market stress-test
items.summary: DeFi Technologies president Andrew Forson says the stablecoin layer is thriving, with more than $150 billion in U.S. Treasuries backing coins like USDT and USDC.

items.title: Sui blockchain suffers another network outage as transactions grind to a halt
items.summary: This is the second time this year that the Sui network has suffered an outage.
